next_steps: Order autoimmune panel including ANA, anti-dsDNA, ENA (specifically Ro/SSA and La/SSB), and ANCA
Consult rheumatology for evaluation of systemic autoimmune symptoms (rash, Raynaud's, hair loss)
Initiate pulse corticosteroid therapy given the threat to optic nerve function and ongoing orbital inflammation
Plan for image-guided orbital tissue biopsy if clinical or radiologic progression continues despite systemic immunosuppression
Request ophthalmology follow-up for serial assessment of optic nerve function, color vision, and ocular motility
